description: Model profiles with rate limits, costs, and recovery config. Source of truth synced to Supabase.

models.name: GLM-5 (Z.AI)
models.notes: Subscription via OpenCode. Throttles by slowing down, not hard cutoff.

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash (Gemini API)
models.notes: Best free tier but strict rate limits. Space requests 5s apart minimum.

models.name: DeepSeek Chat
models.notes: Cheapest API. Cache hits 90% cheaper.

models.name: DeepSeek Reasoner
models.notes: R1 model for complex reasoning tasks.

models.name: ChatGPT 4o Mini
models.notes: Free tier: 10 messages per 3 hours. Attachments may reduce limits.
models.status_reason: Web-only via browser use (ChatGPT free tier)

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.5
models.notes: Rate limits vary by system demand. 5-8 hour reset period.
models.status_reason: Web-only via browser use (Anthropic free tier). No API key.

models.name: Gemini Web
models.notes: 1M tokens/day free tier. Dies fast if exceeded - use with caution.
models.status_reason: Web-only via browser use (Gemini free tier)

models.name: DeepSeek Web
models.notes: Web-based courier via Browser Use (Playwright+CDP). Generous free tier. Rate limited by human-like interaction speed.

models.name: Llama 3.3 70B (Groq)
models.notes: Groq free tier. Ultra fast inference. Good for quick decisions.

models.name: Llama 3.1 8B Instant (Groq)
models.notes: Groq free tier. Fastest. Good for micro-decisions.

models.name: Qwen 3 32B (Groq)
models.notes: Groq free tier. Strong multilingual support.

models.name: Kimi K2 (OpenRouter/Groq)
models.notes: Groq free tier: 60 RPM, 1K RPD, 10K TPM, 300K TPD. Also available via OpenRouter as emergency fallback.
models.status_reason: Benched from Groq. Use moonshotai/kimi-k2-instruct via NVIDIA instead.

models.name: Nemotron Ultra 253B (NVIDIA)
models.notes: NVIDIA NIM free tier: 40 RPM flat, 1000 credits total (token-based consumption), 4096 max output tokens. Credits are shared across all NIM models.

models.name: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct (NVIDIA)
models.notes: NVIDIA NIM free tier: 40 RPM flat, 1000 credits total (token-based consumption), 4096 max output tokens. Credits are shared across all NIM models.

models.name: Kimi K2 Instruct (NVIDIA)
models.notes: NVIDIA NIM free tier: 40 RPM flat, 1000 credits total (token-based consumption), 4096 max output tokens. Credits are shared across all NIM models.

models.name: Llama 4 Scout 17B (Groq)
models.notes: Groq free tier (unverified limits). Using conservative TPD=100K until actual limits confirmed from API headers.

models.name: GPT-OSS 120B (Groq)
models.notes: Groq free tier (unverified limits). Using conservative TPD=100K until actual limits confirmed from API headers.

models.name: Groq Compound (Groq)
models.notes: Groq free tier (unverified limits). Using conservative TPD=100K until actual limits confirmed from API headers.

models.notes: Groq free tier (unverified limits). Using conservative TPD=100K until actual limits confirmed from API headers.

models.name: MiniMax M2.7 (MiniMax)
models.status_reason: No API access. Only available via OpenRouter free tier which is minimax-m2.5.

models.name: Nemotron 3 Super 120B (OpenRouter)
models.notes: OpenRouter free tier: ~20 RPM per model, 200 RPD (unfunded account). Always use :free suffix.

models.name: Gemma 4 31B (OpenRouter)
models.notes: OpenRouter free tier: ~20 RPM per model, 200 RPD (unfunded account). Always use :free suffix.

models.name: Gemma 3 27B (OpenRouter Free)

models.name: UI-TARS 1.5 7B (GUI Specialist)
models.notes: Purpose-built for GUI automation. Ultra-cheap. Ideal courier fuel for browser navigation.

models.name: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct (Free)
models.notes: Free on OpenRouter. Good for simple/fast tasks.

models.name: Gemma 3 4B IT (Free)
models.notes: Free on OpenRouter. Smallest Gemma 3 with vision + structured output. Courier fuel.

models.name: Gemma 3 12B IT (Free)

models.name: Gemma 3n 2B IT (Free)
models.notes: Free on OpenRouter. Newest Gemma 3n line. Ultra-lightweight. Mobile-class.

models.name: Gemma 3n 4B IT (Free)
